name: testColumnHeadersDisplayCorrectlyOnAllPages
description: Verifies that table column headers are displayed correctly on each page when navigating through paginated results.
descriptionHtml: Verifies that table column headers are displayed correctly on each page when navigating through paginated results.

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as '0602.142035.22.super@email.com'
Login with '0602.142035.22.super@email.com' user
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: Verifies that table column headers are displayed correctly on each page when navigating through paginated results.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click 'Acquirers' tab
Select Rows Per Page '10'
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify headers on page '1' with '10' pagination
Click next page button
Verify headers on page '2' with '10' pagination
Select Rows Per Page '25'
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify headers on page '1' with '25' pagination
Select Rows Per Page '50'
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify headers on page '1' with '50' pagination
Select Rows Per Page '100'
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify headers on page '1' with '100' pagination
